arts.sum: Westphalia's Ruhr Nachrichten newspaper reports that illness will keep no fewer than four Borussia Dortmund players out of action this evening at the BayArena.

arts.ttl: ‘Ready for the next step’ – Who is ‘warrior’ Bayer Leverkusen star Piero Hincapie?
arts.sum: Piero Hincapie has only just turned 23 years old but he is already an established Bundesliga player with bags of experience at the highest level. The Bayer Leverkusen defender was part of the club’s unprecedented unbeaten league-winning campaign last term. Xabi Alonso is thought to be a huge fan of the youngster, which is why […] The post ‘Ready for the next step’ – Who is ‘warrior’ Bayer Leverkusen star Piero Hincapie? appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.sum: Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen will kick off 2025 with a trip to Signal Iduna Park for Friday’s clash with Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Aaron Heard: Who is Bayer Leverkusen's USA U17 attacking midfielder?
arts.sum: Aaron Heard joins Bayer Leverkusen as a real prospect for the future, the 18-year-old arriving in Germany with a lot of hype after shining for Philly Union Academy and then St. Louis City SC. Heard began his promising youth career with Maryland club Bethesda-Olney SC before making the short move to the Philly Union Academy, where he became the club's top prospect, aged just 12.
